case_title: TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION VS. BRICHETT JOHNSON et al

NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT HEARING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUL-16-2003 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 218
MINUTES FOR JUL-16-2003 2:00 PM FOR DEPT 218

REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR JUL-16-2003 - STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION IN OPEN COURT REACHED. PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY, MICHAEL ROSSOFF REQUESTED THAT THE STIPULATION NOT BE REPORTED OR FILED WITH THE COURT UNLESS A BREACH WERE TO OCCURR. IRVING PFEFFER, PRO TEM JUDGE. D. CARTER, CLERK; NO REPORTER

MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR JUL-21-2003 VACATED. SETTLED AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE BY PRO TEM JUDGE IRVING PFEFFER ON 7/16/03. D. CARTER, CLERK; WRITTEN STIPULATION SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES WILL NOT BE FILED WITH THE COURT PURSUANT TO DIRECTION FROM PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY, MICHAEL ROSSOFF. MATTER IS TO BE TAKEN OFF TRIAL CALENDAR FOR 7/21/03.
